_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of therapeutic sensitivities in a spheroid drug combination screen of Neurofibromatosis Type I associated High Grade Gliomas

_contextSnippet: Non-serum grown glioma cell lines are considered more accurate models for glioma, moreover, compared to 2D, a 3D organoid like growth activates different signaling pathways and is considered more representative of in vivo models
details: Considered more accurate models for glioma and more representative of in vivo models compared to 2D culture
